---
title: "TEMPEST: Porewater Nutrients"
author: "2023-2025 Samples"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true

output_dir: "To Be Reviewed/PDF"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggh4x)
```

## Grab 2022 and 2023 All Data Files
```{r Pull in 2022-2024 data files, message=FALSE, include=FALSE}

#read in 2023 Nutrient Data:
dat23 <- read.csv("2023/COMPASS_TEMPEST_NUTR_2023.csv", colClasses = "character")
colnames(dat23)
dat23 <- dat23 %>% 
  rename(
    NOx_Conc_mgL = NOx_mgL, 
    NOx_Conc_uM = NOx_uM, 
    NOx_Conc_Flag = NOx_range, 
    NH3_Conc_mgL = NH3_mgL, 
    NH3_Conc_uM = NH3_uM, 
    NH3_Conc_Flag = NH3_range, 
    PO4_Conc_mgL = PO4_mgL, 
    PO4_Conc_uM = PO4_uM, 
    PO4_Conc_Flag = PO4_range, 
  )

#read in 2024 Nutrient Data:
dat24 <- read.csv("2024/COMPASS_TEMPEST_NUTR_2024.csv", colClasses = "character")
colnames(dat24)

#read in 2025 Nutrient Data:
dat25 <- read.csv("2025/COMPASS_TEMPEST_NUTR_2025.csv", colClasses = "character")
colnames(dat24)

all_dat <- bind_rows(dat23, dat24, dat25)

all_dat <- all_dat %>%
  mutate(
    Project = "COMPASS", 
    Site = "TEMPEST", 
    EST_EDT = NA) %>%
  rename( 
    Evacuation_Date_YYYMMDD = Evacuation_Date, 
    Collection_Date_YYYYMMDD = Collection_Date, 
    Plot = Zone) %>%
  select(
    Project, Site, Plot, Grid, Depth_cm, Event_Time, Time_of_day, Sample_ID, 
    Volume_mL, Evacuation_Date_YYYMMDD, Collection_Date_YYYYMMDD, 
    Collection_Start_Time_24hrs, Collection_End_Time_24hrs, EST_EDT, 
    NOx_Conc_mgL, NOx_Conc_uM, NOx_Conc_Flag, NOx_QAQC_Flag, 
    NH3_Conc_mgL, NH3_Conc_uM, NH3_Conc_Flag, NH3_QAQC_Flag, 
    PO4_Conc_mgL, PO4_Conc_uM, PO4_Conc_Flag, PO4_QAQC_Flag,
    Analysis_rundate,  Run_notes, Field_notes
        # list columns in the order you want them
  )

##Set 4 decimal points max
all_dat <- all_dat %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, digits = 4)) ##This does make all salnities 0 when Cl_ppm is 0 instead of 0.000026

```


##Make Relevant Metadata Sheet
```{r make metadata, include = FALSE}

#pull the column names from the all_dat dataframe and create a new dataframe with them 
metadat <- data.frame(Column_Names = colnames(all_dat))
metadat

metadat$Description <- ""
metadat$Units <- ""
metadat$Instrument_ifapplicable <- ""

colnames(all_dat)
#add information about each line: 

metadat$Description <- c("Project name", 
                         "Site where sample collected", 
                         "Plot where sample collected (SW = Saltwater, FW = Freshwater, C = 
                         Control, Estuary (Sourcewater))", 
                         "Grid where sample collected (Letter + Number)", 
                         "Depth where sample collected", 
                         "Event sampling time (T1 through T6)", 
                         "Time of day of sample collection (AM, PM, Midday)",
                         "Sample Identifier", 
                         "Volume of sample collected (mL)", 
                         "Date lysimeter evacuated", 
                         "Date sample collected", 
                         "Time lysimeter evacuated", 
                         "Time sample collected", 
                         "Time zone of sample collection", 
                         "NOx concentration in mg/L", 
                         "NOx concentration in uM", 
                         "NOx concentration flag base on standard curve (bdl=below detection limit (0), adl=above detection limit (highest   
                         standard), Within_Range=within detection range)", 
                         "NOx QAQC Flags generated during checks of standards, blanks, dups, and spks",
                         "NH3 concentration in mg/L", 
                         "NH3 concentration in uM", 
                         "NH3 concentration flag base on standard curve (bdl=below detection limit (0), adl=above detection limit (highest   
                         standard), Within_Range=within detection range)", 
                         "NH3 QAQC Flags generated during checks of standards, blanks, dups, and spks",
                         "PO4 concentration in mg/L", 
                         "PO4 concentration in uM", 
                         "PO4 concentration flag base on standard curve (bdl=below detection limit (0), adl=above detection limit (highest   
                         standard), Within_Range=within detection range)", 
                         "PO4 QAQC Flags generated during checks of standards, blanks, dups, and spks",
                         "The date that samples were run on the Nutrient IC", 
                         "Any notes generated during QAQC", 
                         "Notes generated during field sample collection")

metadat$Units <-       c("NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA", 
                         "mL", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "mg/L", 
                         "uM", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "mg/L", 
                         "uM", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "mg/L", 
                         "uM", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA")

metadat$Instrument_ifapplicable <-  
  
                       c("NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA", 
                         "mL", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "NA",
                         "AQ300 Discrete Analyzer (SEAL)", 
                         "AQ300 Discrete Analyzer (SEAL)", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "AQ300 Discrete Analyzer (SEAL)", 
                         "AQ300 Discrete Analyzer (SEAL)", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "AQ300 Discrete Analyzer (SEAL)", 
                         "AQ300 Discrete Analyzer (SEAL)", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA", 
                         "NA",
                         "NA", 
                         "NA")


```

## Write out files
```{r write out combined data and metadata, include=FALSE}

#write out a csv of all the data to the main folder: 
write.csv(all_dat, "COMPASS_TEMPEST_Nutrient_AllData.csv", row.names = FALSE)


#write out a csv of the metadata associated with the data: 
write.csv(metadat, "COMPASS_TEMPEST_Nutrient_Metadata.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

## Visualize Data by Plot   
```{r Visualize Data, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}

data_plotting <- all_dat

#Order by Zone from Upland to Surface Water
data_plotting$Zone = factor(data_plotting$Zone, levels = c("UP", "SWAMP", "TR", "WC", "SW"))
data_plotting <- data_plotting[order(data_plotting$Zone), ]

#Order by Site from SWH, GCW, MSM, GWI order, which is oligohaline to polyhaline
data_plotting$Site = factor(data_plotting$Site, levels = c("SWH", "GCW", "MSM", "GWI"))
data_plotting <- data_plotting[order(data_plotting$Site), ]

# #Order by Year from 2022-2024
# data_plotting$Site = factor(data_plotting$Site, levels = c("SWH", "GCW", "MSM", "GWI"))
# data_plotting <- data_plotting[order(data_plotting$Site), ]

#Plot samples to get a first look at concentrations (sanity check)
#group the data for plotting
data_plotting_all <- data_plotting %>%
  group_by(Site, Zone) %>%
  mutate(row_num = factor(row_number())) %>%  # create row_num as factor per group
  ungroup()

data_plotting_all$Date <- as.Date(paste(data_plotting_all$Year, data_plotting_all$Month, data_plotting_all$Day, sep = "-"))


#Plot data and change colors based on Zone:
viz_NOx_plot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = as.character(Year), y = NOx_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge2(preserve = "total")) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NOx (mg/L)", title = "Samples: NOx") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))

# viz_NOx_plot


viz_NH3_plot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = as.character(Year), y = NH3_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge2(preserve = "total")) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NH3 (mg/L)", title = "Samples: NH3") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))

# viz_NH3_plot

viz_PO4_plot <- ggplot(data_plotting_all, aes(x = as.character(Year), y = PO4_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge2(preserve = "total")) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "PO4 (mg/L)", title = "Samples: PO4") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))

# viz_PO4_plot

ggarrange(viz_NOx_plot, viz_NH3_plot, viz_PO4_plot, nrow=3, ncol=1)


```


## Summarized data for Site and Zone 
```{r Summarize and Visualize Data, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=16, dpi = 300}

##Make Date Column with just Year and Month for Sample ID
all_dat_dates <- data_plotting %>%
  mutate(
    YearMonth = if_else(
      Month < 10,
      # Modify the string:
      YearMonth <- paste(data_plotting$Year, data_plotting$Month, sep = "-0"), 
      YearMonth <- paste(data_plotting$Year, data_plotting$Month, sep = "-"), 
    )
  )

##Summarize SO4 and Cl by Date, Site, and Zone
Nutrient_avg <- all_dat_dates %>%
  group_by(Month, Year, Site, Zone) %>%
   dplyr::summarize(mean_NOx = mean(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            sd_NOx = sd(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            mean_NH3 = mean(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            sd_NH3 = sd(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            mean_PO4 = mean(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            sd_PO4 = sd(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            YearMonth = first(YearMonth))

# Concatenate with a day (e.g., "01" for the first day)
Nutrient_avg$Date <- paste0(Nutrient_avg$YearMonth, "-01")

# Convert to Date object
Nutrient_avg$Date <- as.Date(Nutrient_avg$Date)

# Define the specific date breaks you want to display
specific_breaks <- as.Date(c("2022-01-01", "2023-01-01", "2024-01-01", "2025-01-01"))

viz_NOx_plot_avgs <- ggplot(Nutrient_avg, aes(x = Date, y = mean_NOx, color = Zone, group = Zone)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_NOx - sd_NOx, ymax = mean_NOx + sd_NOx), width = 0.2) + 
  geom_line() + 
  facet_grid( ~ Site, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "NOx (mg/L)", title = "Samples: NOx") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  scale_x_date(breaks = specific_breaks, date_labels = "%Y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.18, 0.05)))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

# viz_NOx_plot_avgs

viz_NH3_plot_avgs <- ggplot(Nutrient_avg, aes(x = Date, y = mean_NH3, color = Zone, group = Zone)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_NH3 - sd_NH3, ymax = mean_NH3 + sd_NH3), width = 0.2) + 
  geom_line() + 
  facet_grid( ~ Site, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NH3 (mg/L)", title = "Samples: NH3") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  scale_x_date(breaks = specific_breaks, date_labels = "%Y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.18, 0.05)))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

# viz_NH3_plot_avgs

viz_PO4_plot_avgs <- ggplot(Nutrient_avg, aes(x = Date, y = mean_PO4, color = Zone, group = Zone)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_PO4 - sd_PO4, ymax = mean_PO4 + sd_PO4), width = 0.2) + 
  geom_line() + 
  facet_grid( ~ Site, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "PO4 (mg/L)", title = "Samples: PO4") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  scale_x_date(breaks = specific_breaks, date_labels = "%Y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.18, 0.05)))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

# viz_PO4_plot_avgs

ggarrange(viz_NOx_plot_avgs, viz_NH3_plot_avgs, viz_PO4_plot_avgs, nrow=3, ncol=1)

```


## Summarized data for Depth, Site and Zone 
```{r Depth Data, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=16, dpi = 300}

##Summarize SO4 and Cl by Date, Site, and Zone
Nutrient_avg_depth <- all_dat_dates %>%
  group_by(Month, Year, Site, Zone, Depth_cm) %>%
   dplyr::summarize(mean_NOx = mean(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            sd_NOx = sd(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            mean_NH3 = mean(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            sd_NH3 = sd(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            mean_PO4 = mean(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            sd_PO4 = sd(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
            YearMonth = first(YearMonth))

# Concatenate with a day (e.g., "01" for the first day)
Nutrient_avg_depth$Date <- paste0(Nutrient_avg_depth$YearMonth, "-01")

# Convert to Date object
Nutrient_avg_depth$Date <- as.Date(Nutrient_avg_depth$Date)

# Define the specific date breaks you want to display
specific_breaks <- as.Date(c("2022-01-01", "2023-01-01", "2024-01-01"))

viz_NOx_plot_depth <- ggplot(Nutrient_avg_depth, aes(x = Date, y = mean_NOx, color = Zone, group = Zone, shape = as.character(Depth_cm))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_NOx - sd_NOx, ymax = mean_NOx + sd_NOx), width = 0.2) + 
  geom_line() + 
  facet_grid( ~ Site, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NOx (mg/L)", title = "Samples: NOx") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  scale_x_date(breaks = specific_breaks, date_labels = "%Y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.18, 0.05))) + 
  labs(fill = "Zone", shape = "Depth (cm)")+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

# viz_NOx_plot_depth


viz_NH3_plot_depth <- ggplot(Nutrient_avg_depth, aes(x = Date, y = mean_NH3, color = Zone, group = Zone, shape = as.character(Depth_cm))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_NH3 - sd_NH3, ymax = mean_NH3 + sd_NH3), width = 0.2) + 
  geom_line() + 
  facet_grid( ~ Site, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NH3 (mg/L)", title = "Samples: NH3") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  scale_x_date(breaks = specific_breaks, date_labels = "%Y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.18, 0.05))) + 
  labs(fill = "Zone", shape = "Depth (cm)")+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

# viz_NH3_plot_depth


viz_PO4_plot_depth <- ggplot(Nutrient_avg_depth, aes(x = Date, y = mean_PO4, color = Zone, group = Zone, shape = as.character(Depth_cm))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_PO4 - sd_PO4, ymax = mean_PO4 + sd_PO4), width = 0.2) + 
  geom_line() + 
  facet_grid( ~ Site, scales="free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973",
    "SW" = "#25ABE6"
  )) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "PO4 (mg/L)", title = "Samples: PO4") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 0.5))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  scale_x_date(breaks = specific_breaks, date_labels = "%Y", expand = expansion(mult = c(0.18, 0.05))) + 
  labs(fill = "Zone", shape = "Depth (cm)")+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))

# viz_PO4_plot_depth

ggarrange(viz_NOx_plot_depth, viz_NH3_plot_depth, viz_PO4_plot_depth, nrow=2, ncol=1)

```

## Boxplot by depth
```{r Boxplot by depth, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}

##Remove SW
data_plotting_depth <- data_plotting %>%
  filter(Zone != "SW") %>%
  mutate(Depth_cm = factor(Depth_cm, levels = c("45", "20", "10")))


#Plot data and change colors based on Zone:
viz_NOx_depth <-  ggplot(data_plotting_depth, aes(x = Depth_cm, y = NOx_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Sampling Depth (cm)", y = "NOx (mg/L)", title = "") +
  # theme(
  #   panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
  #   panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  coord_flip() 

viz_NOx_depth

#Plot data and change colors based on Zone:
viz_NH3_depth <-  ggplot(data_plotting_depth, aes(x = Depth_cm, y = NH3_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Sampling Depth (cm)", y = "NH3 (mg/L)", title = "") +
  # theme(
  #   panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
  #   panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  coord_flip() 

viz_NH3_depth

#Plot data and change colors based on Zone:
viz_PO4_depth <-  ggplot(data_plotting_depth, aes(x = Depth_cm, y = PO4_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap( ~ Site, scales="free", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Sampling Depth (cm)", y = "PO4 (mg/L)", title = "") +
  # theme(
  #   panel.spacing = unit(.05, "lines"), 
  #   panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  coord_flip() 

viz_PO4_depth

```

## Boxplot summary
```{r Overall Boxplot, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}

all_dat_dates <- all_dat_dates %>% 
    mutate(
    Zone_1 = case_when(
      Zone == "UP" ~ "Upland",
      Zone == "SWAMP" ~ "Swamp",
      Zone == "TR" ~ "Transition",
      Zone == "WC" ~ "Wetland",
      Zone == "SW" ~ "Surface Water",
      TRUE ~ Zone  # keep everything else unchanged
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(Zone_1 = factor(Zone_1, levels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water")))


##Summarize SO4 and Cl by Date, Site, and Zone
viz_NOx_boxplot <- ggplot(all_dat_dates, aes(x = Zone_1, y = NOx_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone_1, group = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(~ Site, scales = "free", independent = "y") + 
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42",
    "Swamp" = "darkgrey",
    "Wetland" = "#419973",
    "Surface Water" = "#25ABE6"
  ), labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NOx (mg/L)", title = "Synoptic CB Porewater: NOx") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))+ 
  #scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water"))+ 
  theme(legend.position = "none")

viz_NOx_boxplot


viz_NH3_boxplot <- ggplot(all_dat_dates, aes(x = Zone_1, y = NH3_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone_1, group = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(~ Site, scales = "free", independent = "y") + 
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42",
    "Swamp" = "darkgrey",
    "Wetland" = "#419973",
    "Surface Water" = "#25ABE6"
  ), labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "NH3 (mg/L)", title = "Synoptic CB Porewater: NH3") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))+ 
  #scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water"))+ 
  theme(legend.position = "none")

viz_NH3_boxplot

viz_PO4_boxplot <- ggplot(all_dat_dates, aes(x = Zone_1, y = PO4_Conc_mgL, fill = Zone_1, group = Zone_1)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(~ Site, scales = "free", independent = "y") + 
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Upland" = "#20063B",
    "Transition" = "#FFBC42",
    "Swamp" = "darkgrey",
    "Wetland" = "#419973",
    "Surface Water" = "#25ABE6"
  ), labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = " ", y = "PO4 (mg/L)", title = "Synoptic CB Porewater: PO4") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"), 
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+ 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))+ 
  #scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water"))+ 
  theme(legend.position = "none")

viz_PO4_boxplot

# ggarrange(viz_cl_plot, viz_so4_plot, nrow=2, ncol=1)

# Save as a PNG
png("COMPASS_SynopticCB_NOx_alldata.png", width = 2000, height = 1200, res = 100) 
print(viz_NOx_boxplot)  # For ggplot objects, use print()
dev.off() 

# Save as a PNG
png("COMPASS_SynopticCB_NH3_alldata.png", width = 2000, height = 1200, res = 100) 
print(viz_NH3_boxplot)  # For ggplot objects, use print()
dev.off() 

# Save as a PNG
png("COMPASS_SynopticCB_PO4_alldata.png", width = 2000, height = 1200, res = 100) 
print(viz_PO4_boxplot)  # For ggplot objects, use print()
dev.off() 

```

## Calculate summary metrics
```{r Additional summary metrics, include=FALSE, dpi = 300}
# It would also be great to add to our collation codes a summary chunk that will calculate value ranges, means, and standard deviations (and errors) for each site, zone, depth for each year; also for each site zone, depth overall; and for each site and zone overall so that we have some easy access to metrics. Was just thinking this might be helpful today when re-collating the DIC data.

colnames(all_dat)

##Metrics for each site, zone, depth for each year
summary_by_year <- all_dat %>%
  group_by(Year, Site, Zone, Depth_cm) %>%
   reframe(
     min_NOx_mgL = min(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_NOx_mgL = max(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_NOx_mgL = mean(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_NOx_mgL = sd(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 

     min_NH3_mgL = min(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_NH3_mgL = max(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_NH3_mgL = mean(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_NH3_mgL = sd(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     
     min_PO4_mgL = min(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_PO4_mgL = max(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_PO4_mgL = mean(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_PO4_mgL = sd(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE))

##Metrics for each site, zone, depth for all years
summary_all_years <- all_dat %>%
  group_by(Site, Zone, Depth_cm) %>%
   reframe(
     min_NOx_mgL = min(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_NOx_mgL = max(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_NOx_mgL = mean(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_NOx_mgL = sd(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 

     min_NH3_mgL = min(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_NH3_mgL = max(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_NH3_mgL = mean(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_NH3_mgL = sd(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     
     min_PO4_mgL = min(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_PO4_mgL = max(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_PO4_mgL = mean(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_PO4_mgL = sd(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE))

##Metrics for each site and zone for all depths and years
summary_all_depths_years <- all_dat %>%
  group_by(Site, Zone) %>%
   reframe(
     min_NOx_mgL = min(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_NOx_mgL = max(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_NOx_mgL = mean(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_NOx_mgL = sd(NOx_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 

     min_NH3_mgL = min(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_NH3_mgL = max(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_NH3_mgL = mean(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_NH3_mgL = sd(NH3_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     
     min_PO4_mgL = min(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE),
     max_PO4_mgL = max(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     mean_PO4_mgL = mean(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE), 
     sd_PO4_mgL = sd(PO4_Conc_mgL, na.rm=TRUE))

```

##Calculate number of samples 
```{r Number of samples, include=FALSE, dpi = 300}
#  I am thinking it might be cool to add to our porewater collation files a table at the end that has total number of samples then also some info about # of samples per zone, site, depth etc.

##Metrics for each year
sample_numbers_years <- all_dat %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
   reframe(
     Number_of_samples = n())

##Metrics for each site, zone, depth for all years
sample_numbers <- all_dat %>%
  group_by(Site, Zone, Depth_cm) %>%
   reframe(
     Number_of_samples = n())
     

```

## Summary Tables
```{r Summary table metrics, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 100}

library(kableExtra)

#Order by Zone from Upland to Surface Water
summary_all_depths_years$Zone = factor(summary_all_depths_years$Zone, levels = c("UP", "SWAMP", "TR", "WC", "SW"))
summary_all_depths_years <- summary_all_depths_years[order(summary_all_depths_years$Zone), ]

#Order by Site from SWH, GCW, MSM, GWI order, which is oligohaline to polyhaline
summary_all_depths_years$Site = factor(summary_all_depths_years$Site, levels = c("SWH", "GCW", "MSM", "GWI"))
summary_all_depths_years <- summary_all_depths_years[order(summary_all_depths_years$Site), ]

NOx_Summary_Statistics <- kable(
  summary_all_depths_years[, c("Site", "Zone", "min_NOx_mgL",	"max_NOx_mgL",	"mean_NOx_mgL", "sd_NOx_mgL")],  
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "NOx Summary Statistics"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 12
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%   # header
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)

NH3_Summary_Statistics <- kable(
  summary_all_depths_years[, c("Site", "Zone", "min_NH3_mgL",	"max_NH3_mgL",	"mean_NH3_mgL", "sd_NH3_mgL")],  
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "NH3 Summary Statistics"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 12
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%   # header
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)

PO4_Summary_Statistics <- kable(
  summary_all_depths_years[, c("Site", "Zone", "min_PO4_mgL",	"max_PO4_mgL",	"mean_PO4_mgL", "sd_PO4_mgL")],  
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "PO4 Summary Statistics"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 12
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%   # header
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)

NOx_Summary_Statistics
NH3_Summary_Statistics
PO4_Summary_Statistics

```

## Number of Samples
```{r number of samples tables, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 100}

#Order by Zone from Upland to Surface Water
sample_numbers$Zone = factor(sample_numbers$Zone, levels = c("UP", "SWAMP", "TR", "WC", "SW"))
sample_numbers <- sample_numbers[order(sample_numbers$Zone), ]

#Order by Site from SWH, GCW, MSM, GWI order, which is oligohaline to polyhaline
sample_numbers$Site = factor(sample_numbers$Site, levels = c("SWH", "GCW", "MSM", "GWI"))
sample_numbers <- sample_numbers[order(sample_numbers$Site), ]

kable(
  sample_numbers_years[, c("Year", "Number_of_samples")],  
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = paste0("Total Samples: ", nrow(all_dat))
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 12
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%   # header
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)

```

```{r Number of Samples Barplots, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=10, dpi = 300}
##Remove SW samples
sample_numbers_pw <- sample_numbers %>% 
  filter(Zone != "SW")

##Number of Samples Plots
sample_num_barplot <- ggplot(sample_numbers_pw, aes(x = as.character(Depth_cm), y = Number_of_samples, fill = Zone)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "black", width = 0.75) + # 'color' adds a border to the bars
  facet_grid(~Site , scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "UP" = "#20063B",
    "TR" = "#FFBC42",
    "SWAMP" = "darkgrey",
    "WC" = "#419973"
  ), labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Depth (cm)", y = "Number of Samples", title = "Synoptic CB Porewater Sample Numbers") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  theme(text = element_text(size = 30))+
  theme(axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 1))+
  theme(axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.25, "cm"))
  #scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Upland", "Swamp", "Transition", "Wetland", "Surface Water"))+
  # theme(legend.position = "none")

sample_num_barplot
```

## Write out summarized data
```{r write out summarized data, include=FALSE}

#write out a csv of all the data to the main folder: 
write.csv(summary_by_year, "COMPASS_SynopticCB_PW_Nutrient_Summarized_By_Year.csv")


#write out a csv of the metadata associated with the data: 
write.csv(summary_all_years, "COMPASS_SynopticCB_PW_Nutrient_Summarized_Years_Combined.csv")


#write out a csv of the metadata associated with the data: 
write.csv(summary_all_depths_years, "COMPASS_SynopticCB_PW_Nutrient_Summarized_Years_and_Depths_Combined.csv")
```
